author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Give Us A Sign - Announcement Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10019641

YOUR VOICE IS THE KEY... AND THE TRIGGER. 🎙️

Every investigation has a price.

Give Us A Sign is a 1-4 player co-op paranormal investigation horror game where your microphone can become your greatest liability. Explore haunted locations, uncover the truth behind terrifying entities, and survive a world that listens to every word you say.

• Voice-reactive gameplay
• Dynamic paranormal encounters
• Deep investigation systems
• 20+ unique lore-driven ghosts
• Reactive environments & modular scares

Coming to PlayStation 5.

Wishlist Now on PlayStation Store.

https://store.playstation.com/concept/10019641

#ps5 #ps5games

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Blue Reflection Quartet - Second Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/en-us/concept/10017140/

BLUE REFLECTION Quartet combines all four titles in the fan-favorite franchise into one magical package. The new collection includes the console games BLUE REFLECTION and BLUE REFLECTION: Second Light; the anime series BLUE REFLECTION RAY; and the mobile game BLUE REFLECTION SUN.

BLUE REFLECTION Quartet will be available digitally July 30, 2026 on PlayStation®5.

#ps5 #ps5games
